div.h2: Retirement List Behavior & Theoretical Bounds (N=16, K=2)
div.p: details: |md ### Parameters - Threads ($N$): 16 Concurrent workers - Slots/Thread ($K$): 2 Hazard Pointers - Reclamation Threshold ($R$): $2NK = 64$ nodes - Workload: 16M Operations (50/50 S/Q) - Memory Order: seq_cst for HP stores

pre.code: - **Orange**: Metadata/Pointers - **Blue**: Application Data - **Gray**: Structural Padding (64B alignment)

div.p: proof_of_boundedness: { label: "Boundedness Guarantee (Invariant Proof)" style.fill: "#FFF3E0" style.stroke: "#E65100"

math: |latex \text{Let } N = \text{Threads, } K = \text{Slots per thread} \ \text{The global set of protected nodes } |P| \le N \times K \ \text{The local retirement list triggers scan at } R = 2NK \ \text{At least } R - |P| \text{ nodes are reclaimed per scan} \ 2NK - NK = NK \text{ nodes guaranteed deallocated.} \ \text{Total system memory } M \in O(N^2K) \text{ across all lists.}
